name: Candela
description: TechEmpower's accessible resource app — a neural-voice audiobook player for any text you have, with offline TTS, optional Azure HD cloud voices, and the Library Nocturne aesthetic
note: Version/build fields intentionally omitted: this file is served STATIC by GitHub Pages (legacy Jekyll, no build-time regeneration), so a pinned version would silently restale every release. The live current version is always at the releases URL above. The footer 'sigil bound' mark degrades gracefully when no version is present.
